description: A 剪定 (sentei) PRUNE over a manifested branch (ADR-2606072000). The Council is the PRUNER, not the censor: the organism's growth from root is never pre-blocked; a branch is pruned only AFTER it manifests. CONSTITUTIONAL (structural at the schema layer): `branchManifested` is const:true — a prune of an unmanifested branch is UNREPRESENTABLE, so prior restraint cannot be expressed (G1). `action` enum has NO delete/halt/prior-restraint/verdict member (G2/G3/G7). `serverHeldKey` is const:false (G5 no-server-key). `nonAdjudicating` is const:true and `reversible` is const:true — a prune is care (美しく保つ), never punishment, and always healable by regraft (G6/G7). Persisted in kotoba EAVT (G2; non-eschatological — the pruned branch's history is never deleted).

branchId.description: The manifested branch (published datom/record id) being pruned.

branchManifested.description: G1 no-prior-restraint: a prune exists ONLY over a manifested branch. The Council cannot stop a branch before it grows.

action.description: D5 vocabulary. delete / halt-organism / prior-restraint / verdict are absent by construction (G2/G3/G7).

basis.description: G7: the Charter basis for the cut (overgrowth / §2(a)-(h) / mirror-violation / G10 named-party). No verdict/guilt value — 剪定 is care, not 制裁.

signerDid.description: Council/member signer (G5). The server can never sign a prune.

councilLevel.description: Transparent Force: Lv6+ ordinary, Lv7+ for an invariant-adjacent prune.

contestedVote.description: Present only for a contested prune: 1 SBT = 1 vote must carry it (G4).

nonAdjudicating.description: G7: a prune carries no guilt/verdict value.

reversible.description: G6: every prune has the inverse regraft; a mistaken cut heals via as-of.
